name: Fettucini with Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 cups tagliarini or egg noodles, hot, cooked, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wide frying pan or chafing dish over high heat on a range, melt the butter until it is lightly browned.
2. Add 1/2 cup of the cream and tomatoes to the pan. Boil rapidly, stirring occasionally, until large shiny bubbles form.
3. Reduce the heat to medium or place the chafing dish over direct flame.
4. Add the noodles to the sauce. Toss vigorously with two forks.
5. Pour in the cheese and the remaining cream a little at a time—about three additions. Ensure the noodles are kept moist but not too liquid.
6. Season with salt and pepper, and grate nutmeg generously over the noodles (or use about 1/8 teaspoon of ground spice).
7. Serve immediately.
